description: Pipeline resilience protocol for OpenClaw — crash-safe handoff, state persistence, zombie detection, recovery hydration

evals.prompt: Execute a complex data pipeline with 5 steps that may take over 10 minutes total
evals.expected_output: Agent detects multi-step long-running pipeline and activates pipeline-resilience skill

assertions.name: skill-triggered
assertions.description: Agent should recognize and announce pipeline resilience activation

evals.prompt: Initialize a pipeline state file for a 3-step task
evals.expected_output: Agent creates a valid JSON state file with status, steps, and timestamps

assertions.name: state-file-valid
assertions.description: State file should contain pipeline_id field

evals.prompt: Complete step 1 of a pipeline and write the handoff for step 2
evals.expected_output: Handoff payload is concise (<500 tokens) and contains only essential state

assertions.name: handoff-compressed
assertions.description: Handoff should not contain raw conversation history

evals.prompt: Resume a crashed pipeline from the state file
evals.expected_output: Agent reads state file and reconstructs context from handoff summary

assertions.name: recovery-context
assertions.description: Recovery should reference the handoff payload

evals.prompt: A pipeline step has been running for 2x its expected timeout
evals.expected_output: Agent detects zombie state and triggers retry

assertions.name: zombie-detected
assertions.description: Agent should detect zombie and attempt retry

evals.prompt: Read the SKILL.md and verify it contains no hardcoded model names, paths, or user names

assertions.name: no-hardcoded-models
assertions.description: Should not reference specific model names
